mission: Core measurements: regional gradient affinity, regional benefits, sign heterogeneity / H / C indices

gradients: compute_gradient_vector(model, data, task, task_index, max_subsample) -> (g_vec, n_used, grad_norm)
write_region_affinity(dataset, task_i, task_j, seed, rows) -> Path
benefits: regional_perf(predictions, region_compounds, task, task_type='clf'|'reg', test_min_*) -> float | NaN
compute_region_deltas(stl_i, stl_j, mtl, partition, task_i, task_j) -> dict[int, RegionDeltas]
aggregate_region_benefits(per_seed_preds..., partition, split, task_i, task_j) -> RegionBenefitSchema-valid DataFrame

acceptance.identity_check_real_tox21: G_ii(r=0) = 1.0 ± 1e-15 on outputs/checkpoints/tox21/stl/task_1/seed0.pt over 76 cached compounds; 282368-dim encoder gradient
acceptance.label_shuffle_drives_to_zero: |mean cos| < 0.20 over 5 trials of independently-labelled task pairs
acceptance.encoder_param_order_locked: encoder_param_order_hash stable across MultiHeadModel rebuilds (with or without extra heads)
acceptance.delta_pair_recovers_known: Δ_pair > 0 in aligned region, Δ_pair < 0 in opposed region (synthetic mock predictions)
acceptance.perf_undefined_for_small_region: regional_perf returns NaN when n < test_min_clf
acceptance.perf_undefined_for_single_class: regional_perf returns NaN on all-positive (or all-negative) region
acceptance.bootstrap_ci_attached: aggregate_region_benefits emits ci_lo/ci_hi for every region; RegionBenefitSchema validates
acceptance.S_synthetic_fixture_true: compute_S_pair returns True when one region has Δ > +ε (CI ≠ 0) and another has Δ < -ε (CI ≠ 0)
acceptance.S_requires_ci_excludes_zero: compute_S_pair returns False when CI on a candidate region crosses 0
acceptance.H_zero_for_uniform_deltas: compute_H == 0 when Δ is constant across regions
acceptance.C_large_for_sign_flips: compute_C > 5 on the synthetic fixture's +3 / -3 deltas
acceptance.C_one_when_no_cancellation: compute_C ≈ 600/(600+0.5) = 0.999 when all Δ have the same sign

integration_notes: compute_regional_gradient infers task names from checkpoint state-dict keys (heads.<task>.fc1.weight); the encoder factory is the registered 'gcn'.
compute_region_deltas accepts test_min_* kwargs as None defaults so callers monkey-patching regional_perf (e.g. A7's pilot test) are not silently overridden.
Within-region bootstrap resamples scaffold groups inside the target region — relies on A4's bootstrap.within_region.within_region_bootstrap.
encoder_param_order_hash is exposed publicly so A6/A8/A11 can assert flatten order is identical across reruns; the test passes on a 282K-param MultiHeadModel.
